name: inverse projection
detail: reconstructs relational data from projections, resolves data conflicts

name: extraction
detail: extracts data similar to a data base query

name: validation
detail: validates data and lists warnings or breaks with an error (ci cd)

name: infrastructure
detail: facilitates pipeline flows (e.g. prune, bootstrap, etc.)

name: maintenance
detail: change the structure of data and keep _meta consistent

name: wrapper
detail: encapsulate multiple other steps for easier user access to projections

name: configuration
detail: generate the configuration for a following step, e.g. by heuristics

name: carrier
detail: Communicated payload from one carrier to another (e.g. transforming error stored in _meta to proper data)
